title: Copper Fire
description: Serverside mod that adds green fire for copper blocks! Using polymer + resourcepack
body:
Serverside polymer mod that adds green fire when a copper block is lit.

The id of the block is `copperfire:fire`:

`/setblock ~ ~ ~ copperfire:fire`

The copper fire is also available as item:

`/give @s copperfire:fire`

---

Make sure to enable [Polymer's autohost functionality](https://polymer.pb4.eu/latest/user/resource-pack-hosting/) to automatically share the resourcepack with players joining the server.
